next_required_steps: Review accepted primary/reserve balance before ACUT execution.
Do not run E or B ACUT primary until B manifests are frozen and audited.
Run a freeze integrity audit across E and B manifests before ACUT runs.
Freeze ACUT profiles and execution manifests.

recommendation.basis: Choose the first protocol-priority repo with >=30 Verified tasks, >=40 recent task-design candidates, and >=4 recent candidate families. Final admission requires official SWE-bench smoke plus B verifier gates or an explicit documented gate decision.

repositories.external_benchmark_source: SWE-bench Verified primary; SWE-bench Full fallback
limitations: This Phase 0 artifact freezes external dataset counts and local repository history supply only.
Denominator-scale SWE-bench container smoke passed for 48 external task(s); after-infra-smoke E count is measured for this slice.
A 48-instance gold smoke measured the usable external slice for Phase 1; B primary is frozen, with full candidate-pool no-op fail rate 1.0.
Barcarolle B primary is frozen with 20 task(s), but full candidate-pool no-op fail rate is 1.0.
External rows are summarized with digests and family labels; patch, test patch, problem statement, and raw commit values are not emitted.

redaction_policy.reason: Do not leave E gold patches or hidden verifier/test material in artifacts that can be read during B generation.

selection_rule.source: Hugging Face dataset rows filtered by repository id
